lines.chinese: 这个梦是怎样结束的呢？
lines.raw: How did the dream end? | 这个梦是怎样结束的呢？

lines.english: Tired of sleeping on the floor,
lines.chinese: 德黑兰有个年轻人，他睡在地板上，感到厌倦，
lines.raw: Tired of sleeping on the floor, | 德黑兰有个年轻人，他睡在地板上，感到厌倦，

lines.english: a young man in Teheran saved up for years to buy a real bed.
lines.chinese: 于是积蓄了好几年，买了一张真正的床。
lines.raw: a young man in Teheran saved up for years to buy a real bed. | 于是积蓄了好几年，买了一张真正的床。

lines.english: For the first time in his life,
lines.raw: For the first time in his life, | 他生平第一次

lines.english: he became the proud owner of a bed which had springs and a mattress.
lines.chinese: 拥有了一张带弹簧和床垫的床，他为此感到十分自豪。
lines.raw: he became the proud owner of a bed which had springs and a mattress. | 拥有了一张带弹簧和床垫的床，他为此感到十分自豪。

lines.english: Because the weather was very hot,
lines.raw: Because the weather was very hot, | 因为天气很热，

lines.english: he carried the bed on to the roof of his house.
lines.chinese: 他便把床搬到了屋顶上。
lines.raw: he carried the bed on to the roof of his house. | 他便把床搬到了屋顶上。

lines.english: He slept very well for the first two nights,
lines.raw: He slept very well for the first two nights, | 头两晚他睡得很好，

lines.english: but on the third night, a storm blew up.
lines.chinese: 但第三天晚上，暴风雨突然降临。
lines.raw: but on the third night, a storm blew up. | 但第三天晚上，暴风雨突然降临。

lines.english: A gust of wind swept the bed off the roof and sent it crashing into the courtyard below.
lines.chinese: 一阵狂风把床从屋顶上刮了下来，摔到了下面的院子里。
lines.raw: A gust of wind swept the bed off the roof and sent it crashing into the courtyard below. | 一阵狂风把床从屋顶上刮了下来，摔到了下面的院子里。

lines.english: The young man did not wake up
lines.raw: The young man did not wake up | 那个年轻人直到

lines.english: until the bed had struck the ground.
lines.raw: until the bed had struck the ground. | 床撞到地上才醒过来。

lines.english: Although the bed was smashed to pieces,
lines.raw: Although the bed was smashed to pieces, | 尽管床摔成了碎片，

lines.chinese: 但那个人却奇迹般地没有受伤。
lines.raw: the man was miraculously unhurt. | 但那个人却奇迹般地没有受伤。

lines.english: When he woke up, he was still on the mattress.
lines.chinese: 他醒来时，仍然躺在床垫上。
lines.raw: When he woke up, he was still on the mattress. | 他醒来时，仍然躺在床垫上。

lines.english: Glancing at the bits of wood and metal that lay around him,
lines.chinese: 他看了一眼周围的木头和金属碎片，
lines.raw: Glancing at the bits of wood and metal that lay around him, | 他看了一眼周围的木头和金属碎片，

lines.english: the man sadly picked up the mattress and carried it into his house.
lines.chinese: 伤心地抱起床垫，把它搬进了屋里。
lines.raw: the man sadly picked up the mattress and carried it into his house. | 伤心地抱起床垫，把它搬进了屋里。

lines.english: After he had put it on the floor,
lines.raw: After he had put it on the floor, | 他把床垫放到地板上，

lines.english: he promptly went to sleep again.
lines.raw: he promptly went to sleep again. | 便很快又睡着了。
